name: should create a splits query — year
description: Test case for should create a splits query — year
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2020,2021,2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years), "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e" as materialized (select COALESCE(bc_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", SUM(rush_yds) as rush_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023) group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(bc_pid)), "t4b249143d58d1977931ed4e38566b0ed" as materialized (select COALESCE(bc_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN bc_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN CAST(ROUND(SUM(rush_yds)::decimal / SUM(CASE WHEN bc_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 2) AS decimal) ELSE 0 END as rush_yds_per_att_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."xpass_prob" between 0 and 0.4 group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(bc_pid)), "tdb5f12b536d486f72f21c8eafcee746c" as materialized (select COALESCE(bc_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", SUM(rush_yds) as rush_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023) and "nfl_plays"."dwn" in (1, 2) group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(bc_pid)) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e"."rush_yds_from_plays" AS "rush_yds_from_plays_0", "t4b249143d58d1977931ed4e38566b0ed"."rush_yds_per_att_from_plays" AS "rush_yds_per_att_from_plays_0", "tdb5f12b536d486f72f21c8eafcee746c"."rush_yds_from_plays" AS "rush_yds_from_plays_1", "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e" on "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e"."pid" = "player"."pid" and t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e.year = player_years.year and "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e"."year" in (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023) left join "t4b249143d58d1977931ed4e38566b0ed" on "t4b249143d58d1977931ed4e38566b0ed"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t4b249143d58d1977931ed4e38566b0ed"."year" = 2023 left join "tdb5f12b536d486f72f21c8eafcee746c" on "tdb5f12b536d486f72f21c8eafcee746c"."pid" = "player"."pid" and tdb5f12b536d486f72f21c8eafcee746c.year = player_years.year and "tdb5f12b536d486f72f21c8eafcee746c"."year" in (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023) group by player.fname, player.lname, "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e"."rush_yds_from_plays", "t4b249143d58d1977931ed4e38566b0ed"."rush_yds_per_att_from_plays", "tdb5f12b536d486f72f21c8eafcee746c"."rush_yds_from_plays", "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
